access_token.description: Asana personal access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>). Never logged.

base_url.description: Asana API base URL override for tests or proxies.

workspace_id.description: Optional Asana workspace gid; scopes the 'projects' and 'tasks' streams to this workspace when set.

project_id.description: Optional Asana project gid; scopes the 'tasks' stream to this project when set.

assignee.description: Optional Asana assignee gid; scopes the 'tasks' stream to this assignee when set.

team_id.description: Optional Asana team gid; scopes the 'team_memberships' stream to this team when set (Asana requires either team, or workspace+user, on that endpoint).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
